entry.title: New: RES25-060 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT FROM THE SALVATION ARMY HAWAIIAN & PACIFIC ISLANDS VALUED AT $1,074.30, TO THE CITY, OF LUNCH AND DINNER MEALS PROVIDED TO THE PARTICIPANTS AT THE DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT'S EMERGENCY OPERATIONS CENTER DURING THE JANUARY 30, 2025 STORM RESPONSE.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
